intro: Acorus calamus decoction, also known as Indian sarsaparilla decoction, is a traditional herbal remedy derived from the rhizome of the Acorus calamus plant. This decoction has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to aid digestion and reduce inflammation. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Acorus calamus decoction for human consumption.
